title: Programmatic Command Blocks
description: Makes the command and test block textures look more modern, using the older command block's style
body:
This resource pack is designed to give command blocks a more modern (?) feel whilst keeping the style of the old 1.8 command block. This pack also resolves an issue with the vanilla textures where the shapes in the center would not be centered:

![All 4 textures of each of the 3 command block variants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9328dc6bb654b1d23d27f11b0cdcf6f3a574ec49.png)

Also, MC version 1.21.5 introduced 2 new technical blocks - the test block and the test instance block. I have made sure to re-texture those as well (the barrier and structure void are re-textured too).

-----
## [ i ] FOR CONTENT CREATORS AND MODPACK DEVS [ i ]

You are free to use this resource pack in your own media and modpacks, as long as you include the name of this pack in your description (this applies to both media and modpacks).
